series_metadata.series_description: All financial assurance instruments, including closure trust funds, surety bonds, letters of credit, closure insurance, and any supporting documentation, cost estimates or other correspondence related to closure and post-closure of a solid or hazardous waste facility.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until facility closure and post closure care addressed ; Electronic: Retain until facility closure and post closure care addressed, Paper: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
